rules.rationale: These exact paths belong only to the read-only generated target tree: aliases, host builder output, migration-only support files, or old generated layout. Their planned removal is an expected deletion, not a portable behavior claim.

The common source deliberately replaces the pre-migration Codex wording and frontmatter with host-independent skill content; these exact content changes are reviewed packaging differences, while ordinary mode-only differences are normalized by the immutable Git oracle.
These exact paths are emitted by the reviewed common/overlay assembly and are absent from the old generated target tree. They are target packaging additions, not omitted portable behavior.

The Codex legacy projection added host-specific frontmatter and invocation vocabulary to this portable skill. The canonical source keeps the shared implementation; the difference is a reviewed host packaging projection.

The portable dashboard keeps identical runtime links while expressing dynamic attributes without literal static references that the materializer would treat as package files; this exact asset-only syntax adjustment is reviewed.
The old generated capability table is replaced by the versioned E1-E6 evidence policy. This is metadata packaging, while runtime behavior remains covered by evidence tests.
These exact paths are the accepted projection, managed-worker runtime, and target-native agent contract introduced by the approved canonical source migration.
